topic: My bathroom door locks itself from the inside while the room is empty.
title: My Bathroom Locked Itself From Inside | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My bathroom door locked itself from the inside while the room was empty.
scenes.image_prompt: A closed bathroom door with a small turn lock engaged, dim hallway light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It was the only bathroom in my narrow rented flat.
scenes.image_prompt: A short hallway ending at a single bathroom door, faded paint, low gray light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I lived alone. I never locked that door.
scenes.image_prompt: A bathroom door standing slightly ajar onto a dim tiled room, soft shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One evening I found it locked, with no one inside.
scenes.image_prompt: A locked bathroom door handle in close view, dim hallway light catching the metal, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I forced it open. The room was empty.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty dim bathroom seen through a pushed open door, sink and tub still, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But the floor inside was wet, and the air was warm.
scenes.image_prompt: A damp tiled bathroom floor with faint puddles, steam haze in the air, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each night the lock turned again. I heard the click.
scenes.image_prompt: A bathroom door lock mechanism in shadow, faint light from beneath the door, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It happened at the same hour, every single night.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark hallway with a thin band of light glowing under a closed bathroom door, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I removed the lock entirely with a screwdriver.
scenes.image_prompt: A removed door lock and a screwdriver lying on the floor beside a bathroom door, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: That night the door held shut as if locked from within.
scenes.image_prompt: A closed bathroom door with no lock, faint light leaking beneath, a hand pressed against it, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I pressed my ear to the wood and heard water running.
scenes.image_prompt: An ear against a closed bathroom door in a dim hallway, faint shadow at the gap below, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: When it finally opened, the mirror was fogged from a shower.
scenes.image_prompt: A bathroom mirror thick with fresh condensation in an otherwise empty room, dim warm light, vertical 9:16 framing
